name: Pxsl
text: I made the bot, obviously im gonna say its good.

name: thugsnugz
text: Clanker actually changed our server vibe. We added it as a joke and now people hop on just to mess with the commands. Always online, never lags out, and genuinely funny. Pxsl nailed it. Easy 5/5.

text: beta tester here, i used clanker in a server i owned and it was pretty awsome! lots of commands to use. good for social servers 5/5
